2606.26490.title: An Empirical Study of LLM-Generated Specifications for VeriFast
2606.26490.paper_summary: Static verification tools can assure industrial scale software, but require significant human labor to write specifications. This is particularly true of static verifiers based on separation logic (SL verifiers), which excel at verifying heapmanipulating programs, but require many complex auxiliary specifications to reason about heap structure. Recent work applies large language models (LLMs) to generate code, tests, and proofs, including specifications for verifiers, but mostly targeting non-SL verifiers. To address this gap, this paper thoroughly evaluates how well LLMs perform when prompted to generate specifications for verifying 303 C functions with the SL verifier VeriFast. We explored eight prompting approaches, ten LLMs, and three input types in two stages. Quantitative and qualitative analyses are used to assess the LLM-generated code and specifications for functional behavior, verifiability and errors. The results show that LLMs preserve functional behavior in source code and specifications (both over 91%), but achieve modest verification success (31.4%). Using Gemini 2.5 Pro and providing formal contracts lead to higher success rates in our setting. Moreover, most errors (94%) come from LLMs' mistakes in the domainspecific knowledge of SL verifiers such as VeriFast. These findings provide guidance for optimizing LLM-generated specifications for SL verifiers.
2606.26490.paper_summary_zh: 靜態驗證工具可以保證工業規模的軟體，但需要大量人力來撰寫規範。這對於基於分離邏輯的靜態驗證器（SL 驗證器）尤其如此，這些驗證器擅長驗證操作堆的程式，但需要許多複雜的輔助規範來推理堆結構。最近的研究應用大型語言模型（LLMs）來生成程式碼、測試和證明，包括驗證器的規範，但主要針對非 SL 驗證器。為了填補這一空白，本文徹底評估了 LLM 在提示生成用於驗證 303 個 C 函數的 SL 驗證器 VeriFast 的規範時的表現。我們在兩個階段探索了八種提示方法、十種 LLM 和三種輸入類型。使用定量和定性分析來評估 LLM 生成的程式碼和規範在功能行為、可驗證性和錯誤方面的表現。結果顯示，LLM 在源碼和規範中保持了功能行為（均超過 91%），但驗證成功率僅為 31.4%。使用 Gemini 2.5 Pro 並提供正式合約在我們的設定中導致了更高的成功率。此外，大多數錯誤（94%）來自 LLM 在 SL 驗證器（如 VeriFast）的領域特定知識中的失誤。這些發現為優化 LLM 生成的 SL 驗證器規範提供了指導。
2606.26490.author: Wen Fan et.al.
2606.26490.authors: Wen Fan, Minh Tran, Sanya Dod, Xin Hu, Marilyn Rego, Danning Xie, Jenna DiVincenzo, Lin Tan
